tech_stack_signals.notes: Replaced legacy <ERP vendor> legacy, runs AcmeRetail's just-in-time manufacturing and distribution
Globally unified platform serving 28 countries from two regional data centers
<ERP vendor> estate runs on Azure; 96% of operations in cloud per public statements
Used for e-commerce performance monitoring during peak periods
Full-stack observability for Tier-1 critical apps including <ERP vendor> in-memory DB, e-commerce, middleware

agentic_signals.description: Fit recommendation and sizing assistance via True Fit integration on D2C web
Likely product recommendations on the unified e-commerce platform; near-term agentic evolution expected

recent_strategic_priorities.priority: Globally unified, cloud-based commerce serving D2C and D2B from a shared codebase across two regional data centers
Quarterly cadence of upgrades aligned to <ERP vendor> releases as the team gains operational maturity
Expansion of partner and wholesale channels (stores-within-stores, B2B direct sales)

incumbent_observability.scope: E-commerce performance trends and peak-period monitoring
Full-stack observability across <ERP vendor> in-memory DB ERP, e-commerce, and middleware connecting warehouse/inventory/distribution

pain_signals.pain: Visibility gaps inside retail stores between POS and network; root cause identification is guesswork
pain_signals.evidence_quote: Public case study notes that store issues required guesswork to identify root cause across POS, network, and Wi-Fi.

pain_signals.pain: Fragmentation across multiple monitoring tools (APM, network, infrastructure) before a unified strategy
pain_signals.evidence_quote: Public case studies describe a journey toward full-stack observability after vendor consolidation challenges.

pain_signals.pain: Order-block messaging flow between channels and <ERP vendor> historically opaque and hard to monitor
pain_signals.evidence_quote: Public case studies discuss the difficulty of monitoring messaging between FTP/<ERP vendor> and how visibility there changed root-cause analysis.
